titleStmt.title: SII 24.107: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 107. (A.R. No. 117 of 1938-39.) III PRĀKĀRA, WEST WALL.

summary.p: Registers a sale of land by the authorities of the temple to ••• ••• •••• Āriyaṉ ••• ••• •••• dēvaṉ alias Bhuvani ••• ••• •••• Mūvēndavēḷāṉ. The record is dated in the 47th year of the king's reign.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
... svasti śrī . pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ nilava malar makaḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟ ciṟan=ta maṇimuṭicūṭi minavar nilaikeṭa villavar kulaitara Eṉaimaṉnavar viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirājakecaripanma
rāṉa cakkaravattikaḷ kiy kulottuṅkacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 4 10 7 Āvatu tiruvaraṅkattāḻvān kanmikaḷil śrīvayiṣṇavavāriyam perumpuliyūr vaṇṭuvarāpati nampiyum pattaṅkit tiruvaraṅka perumpaṟṟappu Ārāvamutu
puṇṭarikaṉum pāratāyan cirāman Arāvamutum Āritan kecavan taniyi man ciṅkan tiruvaraṅka nārāyaṇanum Āritan Irākavan ciykārimāṟanum pāratā yan cikiṣṇan tiruvaraṅka nārāyaṇanampi koyil kaṇakku
Ampi nāṭṭu cerikkuṭi kkuṭaiyān Āriyan A ta tevanāna puvani muven=taveḷānukkuk viṟṟukkuṭutta Āḻvār tiruppa varaṅka nallūril maturā
ntakac caruppetimaṅkalattu sabhaiyārkku En niṭṭukkūṭina paḷḷi nilam Iraṇṭarai nikki nirnilam Eḻaraiyum kāṭunilam nālu veliyum pāccilāka tittu paḷḷi nilam m Ivanukkuk kāṇiyā
ka viṟṟuk kuṭutta nila vilaiyāka śrīppaṇṭārattey Oṭu ṇṭa kācu Iraṇṭu Ikkācu Iraṇṭum Oṭukkuvittukkoṇṭu Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷap perumāḷ tiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉa tirumukappaṭi jaya
muven=taveḷānukkum Ivan vaṟkattārkume ka mahentran tiruccuṟṟu māḷikaiyile kalveṭṭik koḷḷap peṟuvanāka sammatittu viṟṟukkuṭuttom Āḻvār kanmikaḷom Ippaṭikku Ivai ko neḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tiruvaraṅkappiriya
neḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Ārāvamutu puṇṭarikaneḻuttu tiru varaṅkappiccaneḻuttu Ippaṭikku pāratāyan cirāman Ārāvamutineḻuttu Ippaṭikku Āritan cirākavan ciṅkārimāṟa neḻuttu Ivai kecuvan taniyiḷan ciṅkattine nārāyaṇaneḻuttu
ti yeḻuttu Arikulavāraṇadāsaneḻuttu pe �saneḻuttu Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷadāsaneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kāśyapan ciṅkan tiruvaraṅkanārāyaṇaneḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 24.107 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
